toolInput:
{"file_path":"/tmp/label-monitor.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash
# Poll GitHub issue #2689 labels and record transitions
LOGFILE="/tmp/label-log.txt"
PREV_LABELS=""

echo "=== P3T33b Label Progression Monitor ===" > "$LOGFILE"
echo "Start time: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" >> "$LOGFILE"
echo "" >> "$LOGFILE"

poll() {
  local labels
  labels=$(gh issue view 2689 --json labels --jq '.labels[].name' 2>&1)
  local ts
  ts=$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')

  if [[ "$labels" != "$PREV_LABELS" ]]; then
    echo "[$ts] TRANSITION: $labels" >> "$LOGFILE"
    echo "[$ts] TRANSITION detected: $labels"
    PREV_LABELS="$labels"
  else
    echo "[$ts] No change: $labels" >> "$LOGFILE"
  fi
}

# Poll immediately then every 60s for up to 90 minutes
poll
for i in $(seq 1 90); do
  sleep 60
  poll
  # Check for done/failed state to exit early
  if echo "$PREV_LABELS" | grep -q "kody:done\|kody:failed"; then
    echo "[$(date -u '+%Y-… [+178 chars]
{"command":"chmod +x /tmp/label-monitor.sh && nohup bash /tmp/label-monitor.sh > /tmp/label-monitor-stdout.txt 2>&1 &\necho \"PID: $!\"","description":"Start background label monitoring process"}
